leadText: Herbed Sausage (Japanese: ハーブソーセージ Herb Sausage) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very salty and bitter ingredient. The balance between the potent saltiness and the herbs' bitterness make this sausage a pleasure.
